creator: bd@tbug.org
text:
DESCRIPTION should at least have 'vnelvis' to start with.  "It is preferrable to .." does not make sense.  "..must have a terminal capable of displaying Vietnamese, e.g. or" should have some examples of Vietnamese-capable terms. A few other minor errors were also found.

Fix: 

- replace "is an adaptation of ..." with "vnelvis is an adaptation of .."
- replace "... preferable to because ... " with " ... preferable to others because ..."
- replace "allows user to edit ..." with "vnelvis allows use to edit ..."
- replace "... have a terminal capable of displaying Vietnamese, e.g., or" with "... have a terminal capable of displaying Vietnamese, e.g., vnterm."
- replace "The default settings is ..." with "The default setting is ..."
How-To-Repeat: Installing vnelvis from /usr/ports/vietnamese/vnelvis and read the man page.
